snippet.title: Pajak x Tasko - Psiho (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Produced by Urban Records
¬© Publishing & copyright - Urban Records/All rights reserved ‚úĒÔłŹ 

ūüé∂ Muzika: Pajak & Tasko
ÔłŹūüé∂ Tekst: Pajak & Tasko
ÔłŹūüé∂ Aranzman/Beat: Premise
ÔłŹūüé∂ Mix i Mastering: Ivan Jovanov - Iwayo

ūüďĹ Directed and edited By B.Gordan
ūüďĹ Camera: Billy D.
ūüďĹ FX & Transitions: Nikola Naumovski
ūüďĹ Organization: Taskovski Boris
     Makeup: Angela

ūüďł Follow Tasko:
@facebook: https://bit.ly/3fuWJHe
@instagram: https://bit.ly/3dnQrGJ

ūüďł Follow Pajak
@facebook: https://bit.ly/2PKItzg
@instagram: https://bit.ly/3mbclBk

ūüďł Follow Urban Records: 
@facebook : https://bit.ly/3u7Q2PA
@instagram : https://bit.ly/2PN1D7D

Booking Pajak & Tasko:  +38978230212 / Pragma Music Entertainment

Tekst

Pajak:
Koj sum da vidam
Na redot li bev
Sekogash lovec ne nikogas plen
Naporno rabotam Buden do 5 
Ej ja

I vekje nisto ne e bitno
A se sto pravime e idno
Se sto pravite e isto
Mama postavav jas psiho psiho

Tasko:
Papa spremni za borba, vleguvam na bitovi,
Gladni sme kako pitovi, veruvaj ne sme pitomi,
Igrava ja pridobiv, i zemav se sto treba, 
Tamu kade sto sum jas, veruvaj vas ne ve gledam !

A ja sedaaam,
Tamu podolgo vreme, koj probal pak na tronot da sedne se zaebal pred vreme,
Vi se smeam, 
Zasto trcate po mene, dur ja trcam po nov GL Mercedes da vozam denes !

Definicija za hustla, nagrada mi e i kazna,
Ali mnogu brzo rastam, nema kasa da e prazna,
Gledaj im ja vadam masta, sakaa i da me raspnat, 
ama moze kje me zaprat, ako me staat u sandak !

Pajak:
I vekje nisto ne e bitno
A se sto pravime e idno
Se sto pravite e isto
Mama postavav jas psiho psiho

snippet.title: Camdaki KńĪz | 1. B√∂l√ľm
snippet.description:
Camdaki KńĪz 1. B√∂l√ľm 

8 Nisan PerŇüembe

T√ľrkiye'nin en b√ľy√ľk oteller zinciri olan Korońülu'nun Ňüirketinde mimar olarak √ßalńĪŇüan Nalan, yumuŇüak huylu, zeki, sńĪcakkanlńĪ ve d√ľnyalar g√ľzeli bir gen√ß kadńĪndńĪr. Ailesinin tek √ßocuńüudur. HayatńĪnńĪ varlńĪk, ilgi, alaka i√ßinde ge√ßirmiŇü, en iyi okullardan dereceyle mezun olmuŇü olan Nalan'ńĪn, herkesten sakladńĪńüńĪ bir sńĪrrńĪ vardńĪr...

Dińüer yandan Nalan'ńĪn √ßalńĪŇütńĪńüńĪ Ňüirketin gen√ß veliahtńĪ Sedat, kendisinden yaŇü√ßa b√ľy√ľk ve evli bir kadńĪn olan, sosyetik g√ľzel Cana ile uzun yńĪllardńĪr yasak bir iliŇüki yaŇüamaktadńĪr. Ňěirketin sahibi ve Sedat'ńĪn babasńĪ olan Rafet Korońülu, yńĪllarca didinip kurduńüu Korońülu imparatorluńüunun itibarńĪnńĪn, ŇüńĪmarńĪk ońülu Sedat tarafńĪndan lekelenmesine izin vermeyecektir. Rafet, Sedat'ńĪ Cana'dan ayńĪrmak i√ßin, onu zorla baŇüka biriyle evlendirmeye karar verir.

Ve kader √ßarkńĪ d√∂ner... Sedat ile Nalan'ńĪn yollarńĪ kesiŇüir. HayatńĪ boyunca kendisini babasńĪna ispatlayamamńĪŇü olan Sedat'ńĪn tek √ßaresi, daha √∂nce hi√ß tanńĪmadńĪńüńĪ Nalan'la evlenmektir. Peki Sedat, Nalan'ńĪn hayallerindeki "kurtarńĪcńĪ prens" midir? 

√áocukluklarńĪndan yaralńĪ olan bu ikili kavuŇüup masallardaki gibi bir aŇük yaŇüayabilecek midir? Yoksa onlarńĪ bug√ľne kadar hi√ß hayal etmedikleri bir karanlńĪk mńĪ beklemektedir?

G√ľlseren BudayńĪcńĪońülu‚Äônun aynńĪ isimli romanńĪndan uyarlanan, ger√ßek bir aŇük hikayesinin konu alńĪndńĪńüńĪ Camdaki KńĪz, baŇüarńĪlńĪ oyuncu kadrosuyla da g√∂z dolduruyor. Nalan karakterini Burcu Biricik‚Äôin canlandńĪrdńĪńüńĪ Camdaki KńĪz‚Äôda; Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu G√ľler, Feyyaz Ňěerifońülu, Hamza YazńĪcńĪ, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur S√ľrer, Selma Erge√ß,  Ňěerif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tuńürul T√ľlek yer alńĪyor. Senaryosunu Seda AltaylńĪ Turgutlu‚Äônun kaleme aldńĪńüńĪ, y√∂netmenlińüini ise Nadim G√ľ√ß'√ľn √ľstlendińüi Camdaki KńĪz PerŇüembe 20.00'de Kanal D'de!

------------------

Camdaki KńĪz Trailer is streaming! Adapted from Gulseren Budayicioglu‚Äôs novel of the same name, Camdaki KńĪz is based on a true love story. Kanal D‚Äôs new drama has a phenomenal cast. Burcu Biricik is going to portray the character Nalan, and the other successful actors and actresses of the series are Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu Guler, Feyyaz Serifoglu, Hamza Yazici, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur Surer, Selma Ergec, Serif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tugrul Tulek. Written by Seda Altayli Turgutlu, directed by Nadim Guc, Camdaki Kiz is going to premier on 8 April Thursday at 8 pm on Kanal D!

Oyuncular:  Burcu Biricik, Devrim Yakut, Feyyez Ňěerifońülu, Hamza YazńĪcńĪ, Hande Ataizi, Nur S√ľrer, Selma Erge√ß, Ňěerif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tuńürul T√ľlek bulunuyor

Web Site : https://www.ogmpictures.com/
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/Camdaki-K%C4%B1z-105205951609216/,
Twitter : https://twitter.com/camdakikizdizi

snippet.title: GUH - POCEO OD NULE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH
AranŇĺman: @jonezr
Mix i Master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @jovanradoviic
Directed by: GUH, @jovanradoviic
Video Edit & Post Production: @jovanradoviic
https://www.instagram.com/jovanradoviic‚Äč‚Äč

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow‚Äč and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

How‚Äôs this for an all-new epic drag race! 

We‚Äôve got Mat in the all-new BMW M4, and he‚Äôs lining up alongside the Mercedes-AMG C63 S & Audi RS5!

So how do they match up? First up we've got the M4, and under the bonnet you‚Äôll find a 3-litre straight-six which can deliver 510hp & 660Nm of torque. 

As for the AMG, well it‚Äôs not too different. It may have a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 instead, but it can also deliver 510hp, coupled with 700Nm. Finally we have the RS5, which has a 2.9-litre V6 which can put down 450hp and 600Nm of torque. 

Think the Audi is the underdog? Well it has one key benefit - Quattro AWD! As for both the BMW and AMG? Well, they've only got RWD! Will that make the difference? You‚Äôll have to keep watching to find out!

snippet.title: Customizing Many Shoes.
snippet.description:
Hey Guys! Today I am going to be painting and customizing multiple pairs of some plain white vans. Shoes are such a fun item to paint, and I have so many ideas for ways to decorate these. I hope I give you some inspiration for a fun painting project! I love making custom shoes because you can really put your own style on them and make them personal to you (even if you never actually wear them lol). This is always such a cool, creative and easy activity to do if you're bored or need to get over artist's block. You can even use this technique to up cycle some old shoes!

*The Rubik's Cube pre-order is still ON! But it ends soon, don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

SUPPLIES I USED (contains affiliate links):
Angelus Leather Paint (big bottles): https://amzn.to/2QzjUmG‚Äč
Angelus Leather Paint (small bottles): https://amzn.to/2U5gmuo‚Äč
Vinyl Red Tape: https://amzn.to/2WHjhLR‚Äč
High Gloss Acrylic Finisher: https://amzn.to/2J4mCwc


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh ūüėā ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)

localized.title: Customizing Many Shoes.
localized.description:
Hey Guys! Today I am going to be painting and customizing multiple pairs of some plain white vans. Shoes are such a fun item to paint, and I have so many ideas for ways to decorate these. I hope I give you some inspiration for a fun painting project! I love making custom shoes because you can really put your own style on them and make them personal to you (even if you never actually wear them lol). This is always such a cool, creative and easy activity to do if you're bored or need to get over artist's block. You can even use this technique to up cycle some old shoes!

and keep the distance

we have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Sedim kuńái cele nońái maskiran
Svetom vlada ńćudna epidemija
ńĆekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda piŇ°e LOCK DOWN,
VidiŇ° na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci ńćini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru ńćekamo
Da me grliŇ° hońáu jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva

Fuckin virus is flyin around

Ň†ta ńáe dalje biti baŇ° me zanima
ńĆekaj, hani, hani, da prońĎu ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
JoŇ° samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reńć
Punińćemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i Beńć.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je ńźole ńźogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je Ň°to smo sami,
Ne moŇĺemo vani
Zato dońĎi meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok imaŇ° mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.

snippet.title: Na veńćeri kod: Bojan Vaskovińá / sezona 2 / ep7
snippet.description:
Sledeńái domańáin tima So koji ńáe u svom domu ugostiti ekipu Biber je Bojan Vaskovińá, frontmen jednog od najpopularnijih bendova domańáe muzińćke scene - "Lexington".
Ovaj rońĎeni Sarajlija otkriva kako je pred granatama bio prinuńĎen da napusti rodni grad i Ň°ta je sve proŇ°ao dok se nije skuńáio u prestonici. NesuńĎenom fudbaleru je omiljeni sport zaista najvaŇĺnija sporedna stvar na svetu i jedino oko ńćega ume da se "zakańći" sa svojom suprugom.
Videńáete kako se Bojan snaŇ°ao na pijaci a kako u kuhinji i zaŇ°to njegova lepŇ°a polovina kaŇĺe da je tu, prvenstveno, odlińćan degustator.

Duhovit i Ň°armantan, Bojan se pokazao kao veseo, raspevan i zabavan domańáin Tijani Dapńćevińá, Zorani Pavińá, Sanji Vuńćińá, Borisu Pingovińáu, Nigoru i Veljku Kuzmanńćevińáu koji je svojim komentarima zabavio i svoju ekipu i domańáine.


Label and copyright: Radio-televizija Srbije

snippet.title: Emanet 156. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 156 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

#Emanet
#SehYam

Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode moŇĺete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak prińće o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" prińća o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaŇ°a ńćiji postupci se i dan danas preprińćavaju. Na ńćelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih Ňĺestokih momaka sa naŇ°ih prostora, zańćetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir MagaŇ°, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. Pravińćan, patriota pomalo preke naravi reŇ°avao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anńĎeo ńćuvar dok je za ove druge bio nońána mora, a gnev i jańćinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odlińćno pamtili. ŇĹivotni put Ljubomira MagaŇ°a i druŇĺine koju je okupio oko sebe, moŇĺe se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbriŇĺnih deńćaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovńćega. Saznańáemo na koje sve skrivene i javne nańćine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih dogańĎaja iz njegovog Ňĺivota. ńĆuńáemo i svedońćanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentaristińćkih akcionih filmova.

Posetite naŇ° sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Instagramu: http://bit.ly/PRVAig
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Tviteru: http://bit.ly/PRVAtwitter

#dosije #masanlekic #PRVA

Sami'nin adamlarńĪ tarafńĪndan vurulan Mahur'u, MaraŇülńĪ hastaneye yetiŇütirir, Mahur hemen ameliyata alńĪnńĪr. Haberi alan Aziz, Firuzan ve ńįlhan hastaneye koŇüarlar. T√ľm aile Mahur'u koruyamadńĪńüńĪ i√ßin MaraŇülńĪ'ya y√ľklenir. MaraŇülńĪ, kendisine kurulan bu kumpasńĪn √∂c√ľn√ľ almak i√ßin ant i√ßer. √Ėfkeli olan MaraŇülńĪ, intikamńĪnńĪ hangi yoldan alacaktńĪr? Acar, ońülu Sami'yi MaraŇülńĪ'dan saklar. MaraŇülńĪ'nńĪn geleceńüinden korkan Acar √∂nlemler alsa da MaraŇülńĪ'nńĪn eline d√ľŇüer. Acar'ńĪ konuŇüturarak Sami'ye ulaŇümak isteyen MaraŇülńĪ amacńĪna ulaŇüabilecek midir? Kalan mallarńĪn yerini sadece Sami bildińüi i√ßin SavaŇü onu korumaya alńĪr. Bu durum MaraŇülńĪ ve SavaŇü'ńĪ karŇüńĪ karŇüńĪya getirir. SavaŇü'ńĪn adamlarńĪ MaraŇülńĪ'nńĪn evini tarar. SavaŇü, MaraŇülńĪ'yńĪ Sami'nin peŇüini bńĪrakmasńĪ i√ßin tehdit eder. MaraŇülńĪ, Sami'yi √∂ld√ľrmek i√ßin, SavaŇü da Sami'yi yaŇüatmak i√ßin b√ľy√ľk bir √ßatńĪŇümaya girer. Bu √ßatńĪŇüma kayńĪplara neden olacaktńĪr.

¬°Ya no hay operaci√≥n! ¬°Ah√≠ est√° MaraŇülńĪ! "

en.title: MaraŇülńĪ Episode 11
en.description:
MaraŇülńĪ Episode 11 - Summary:
"There is no operation anymore! There is MaraŇülńĪ!"
After being shot by Sami's men, MaraŇülńĪ rushes Mahur to the hospital, and Mahur is immediately taken to surgery. Upon receiving the news, Aziz, Firuzan, and ńįlhan rush to the hospital. The whole family blames MaraŇülńĪ for not being able to protect Mahur. MaraŇülńĪ swears to avenge the trap set up for him. How will MaraŇülńĪ take his revenge? ńįlhan and DilŇüad, who have buried Ozan's body, are in fear. Deciding to divorce, ńįlhan wants to kick DilŇüad out of the house. But DilŇüad does not give up easily and threatens ńįlhan. There is only one solution for ńįlhan. Will ńįlhan be able to implement this difficult decision? Having learned about ńįlhan's decision, what precautions will Necati take? Acar hides his son, Sami, from MaraŇülńĪ. Fearing MaraŇülńĪ to come, Acar falls into the hands of MaraŇülńĪ, even though he takes precautions. Will MaraŇülńĪ, who wants to reach Sami by making Acar talk, reach his goal? Since only Sami knows where the remaining goods are, SavaŇü takes him under protection. This situation pits MaraŇülńĪ and SavaŇü against each other. SavaŇü's men rake MaraŇülńĪ's house. SavaŇü threatens MaraŇülńĪ to let Sami go. MaraŇülńĪ, who wants to kill Sami, goes into combat with SavaŇü, who wants to keep him alive. This conflict will cause losses.

B√ľt√ľn umutlarńĪnńĪn t√ľkendińüi yerde yardńĪm isteyebileceńüi tek bir insan kalmńĪŇütńĪr; yńĪllardńĪr g√∂rmedińüi, kendisini daha dońümadan terk eden babasńĪ KńĪra√ß √Ėzdal‚Ä¶ 

PiyasanńĪn en √ľnl√ľ menajerlik Ňüirketlerinden biri olan Ego Ajans‚ÄôńĪn beŇü ortańüńĪndan biri olan KńĪra√ß, varlńĪńüńĪnńĪ herkesten sakladńĪńüńĪ kńĪzńĪ Dicle‚Äôyi karŇüńĪsńĪnda g√∂rd√ľńü√ľnde Ňüoke olur. BabasńĪnńĪn yardńĪm ricasńĪnńĪ savuŇüturmaya √ßalńĪŇümasńĪ Dicle‚Äônin gururunu √ßok kńĪrar‚Ä¶ Ama hi√ß beklenmedik bir anda karŇüńĪsńĪna b√ľy√ľk bir fńĪrsat √ßńĪkar ve babasńĪna rańümen Feris‚Äôin ona yaptńĪńüńĪ iŇü teklifini kabul eder.
